title: limonium carolinianum
intro: Limonium carolinianum, also known as sea lavender or Carolina sea lavender, is a perennial plant species within the family Plumbaginaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Limonium carolinianum are typically used in teas, infusions, or as a dried powder, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
